_comment: Single source of truth for OSI hard-block list. Updated every time Andy flags a bounce or tells Claude to cancel future emails to a company. Read at runtime by the Pre-Send Gate in osi-email-sender/SKILL.md. Do NOT hardcode these values anywhere else.

addresses.reason: Torrey Crabtree, Big River. Confirmed invalid by Andy 2026-04-22.
Mike Wills, altafiber. Bad email. Confirmed by Andy 2026-04-22.
Henry Jacobsen, Grande Communications. Confirmed invalid by Andy 2026-04-22.
Lawrence Edmond, Nitel. Replied that osiglobal.com domain is recognized as spam. 2026-04-23.
Gary Duttenhefer, Consolidated Telcom. Hard-bounced after Email 2 of 6. HubSpot record lists garyduttenhefer48645152@gmail.com instead.

domains.reason: Nitel flagged osiglobal.com as spam per Lawrence Edmond reply 2026-04-23. Block entire domain.
